<!-- Design system: the visual source of truth. Generated by /design-system (ui-ux-pro-max), read by everything that builds UI. -->

# Design System

The **visual source of truth** for [PROJECT NAME]. The MASTER section below defines the global
design — pattern, palette, typography, effects, anti-patterns. Per-feature sections record what's
specific to one feature without contradicting the MASTER.

`context/ui-tokens.md` and `context/ui-rules.md` are the **enforced subset** of this file — the
concrete `@theme` tokens and component rules `/implement` applies. When this file changes, sync them.

---

## How this file grows

- `/design-system` writes it. The **first** run establishes the MASTER. **Later** runs append a
  per-feature section and reconcile against the MASTER.
- Read it before any UI work (`/design-system`, `/implement`, `/imprint`, `/review` all do).
- Don't edit the MASTER casually — a change to the global palette or typography is a system-wide
  decision. If a feature needs to break it, that's an ADR (`/grill-with-docs`), not a quiet override.

---

## MASTER

_Empty. The first `/design-system` run fills this from ui-ux-pro-max output._

### Pattern

[The overall UI pattern / layout archetype — e.g. dashboard, marketing, app shell.]

### Style

[The visual style direction — e.g. minimal, brutalist, glassy, editorial.]

### Color palette

[Primary, neutrals, status colors. The full palette — `ui-tokens.md` holds the `@theme` subset.]

### Typography

[Font pairing — heading font + body font, weights, the scale.]

### Effects

[Shadows, radii, motion, gradients — the key effects that define the feel.]

### Anti-patterns

[What this design must NOT do — the engine's flagged anti-patterns, mirrored into `ui-rules.md` Do Nots.]

---

## Per-feature

_Empty. Each `/design-system` run appends a `## [Feature] — design` section here._
